lesson.menu_desc: Listening for needs and recommending the right solution -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Understanding Customer Needs
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 7 -- Understanding Customer Needs

listenings.text: Hi Patrícia, this is Mike from the customer team. Before our call, I want to share our main needs. First, we need faster onboarding for new users. Second, clear reporting is a key requirement for us. We also have one expectation: the solution should be simple, with little training. I would like your recommendation on the best option for our team. If you could suggest a plan that fits, that would be a great outcome. Thanks, and talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, this is Sofia from the success team. I reviewed the customer's needs assessment, and I have a quick suggestion. Their main need is faster onboarding, and clear reporting is a firm requirement. My recommendation is the premium option, because it fits their expectations and gives a strong benefit: less manual work for the team. I would also recommend that you book a short demo first. The outcome we want is a happy customer who sees a real benefit. Let me know what you think.
